title: Update API to be able to retrieve a user account's department
excerpt: I would like to be able to use use a GraphQL query against the API to be able to retrieve the department defined for each Monday.com user account.  Looking at the API documentation there isn’t a way to request this confi…

posts.author: hbouk (Howard Bouk)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to be able to use use a GraphQL query against the API to be able to retrieve the department defined for each Monday.com user account. Looking at the API documentation there isn’t a way to request this configuration information.

posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @hbouk,

Thank you for the feedback! Our team will review this
